name: YLL 3.0 Induction Heater
summary: The YLL 3.0 Induction Heater is a premium torch-free heating device designed for fast, precise, and consistent performance.
description: The YLL 3.0 Induction Heater is a premium torch-free heating device designed for fast, precise, and consistent performance. Built for DynaVap vaporisers, it features adjustable power from 30–100W, a customisable heating chamber, and a flip OLED display for complete control. Powered by dual removable 21700 batteries (not included), the YLL 3.0 delivers long-lasting portable performance with convenient USB-C charging. The YLL 3.0 allows users to fine-tune heat intensity and extraction with adjustable wattage and chamber depth settings. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
